title: A tiny round multicolored UFO follows an airplane on its way to Brasília [1999]
excerpt: JULY 29th, 1999. Time: 23h40 pm. Duration: 3 minutes. During a flight from Palmas, State of Tocantins, to Brasília, Distrito Federal – just above the region between the cities of Porto Nacional [Tocantins] and Minaçu [Goiás] – a pilot and a co-pilot spotted a small round multicolored UFO [“red, orange and white”], the size of […]
text_preview:
JULY 29th, 1999. Time: 23h40 pm. Duration: 3 minutes. During a flight from Palmas, State of Tocantins, to Brasília, Distrito Federal – just above the region between the cities of Porto Nacional [Tocantins] and Minaçu [Goiás] – a pilot and a co-pilot spotted a small round multicolored UFO [“red, orange and white”], the size of “an orange” moving away and approaching the side of the aircraft and at the same altitude of 18,000ft. Also according to the observations made in the report to COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], one of the witnesses stated that:

“The object appeared on the r
location: Porto Nacional / Minaçu (en route Palmas to Brasília)
summary: A pilot and co-pilot on a Palmas-Brasília flight observed a small multicolored round UFO pacing their aircraft at 18,000ft for 3 minutes on July 29, 1999.
